sourcePrompt: An AK-47, the iconic rifle of the NVA and Viet Cong, just under a meter long and lying level. A rugged rifle with a deep banana magazine curving down from the middle, a warm reddish-brown wood handguard, pistol grip and buttstock, a gas tube riding above the barrel, a front sight post, and a slanted muzzle cut. Blued steel and weathered wood, purposeful. Low-poly, game-ready, clean hard edges.
